case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. QIU E HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-22-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, QIU E $2,409.23 PRINCIPAL, $362.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,772.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100115613)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100115613) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100049298), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED AUG-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, QIU E
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, QIU E

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-21-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
